description_long: This is a full-size black computer keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout, including a numeric keypad on the right and a row of function keys along the top. The keys are individually raised and feature white labeling for high visibility, with additional media and shortcut buttons located above the function keys. The keyboard has a built-in wrist rest extending from the front edge, providing ergonomic support for prolonged typing sessions. A visible cable extends from the top center, indicating a wired connection. The surface appears to be made of matte plastic with some glossy accents around the media controls. The overall design is robust and suitable for both office and gaming environments.
description: A full-size black keyboard with a numeric keypad, wrist rest, and visible cable, featuring white-labeled keys and media controls. The surface is primarily matte plastic with some glossy accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, wrist rest, and cable extending from the top center.
description_view_1: Left angled view highlighting the depth of the wrist rest and the raised profile of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cable attachment and the back edge of the keyboard, with the brand logo visible.
description_view_3: Right angled view emphasizing the numeric keypad and the side profile of the wrist rest.
